response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified video content: 00:00-00:04 consists of a vocal performance segment (Rolling Girl), 00:04-02:34 is an MC/talk segment, and 02:34-04:59 is a full vocal performance segment (Connect). 2. Resolved song metadata: 'Rolling Girl' is originally by wowaka. 'Connect' is originally by ClariS, composed by Watanabe Sho. 3. Performed searches: 'ローリンガール wowaka 歌詞' and 'コネクト 渡辺翔 歌詞'. 4. Obtained full lyrics and translations for both songs. 5. Mapped scenes to the JSON structure including all required fields, escaping special characters.
response.global_summary: A video of VTubers Raora Panthera and Kronii featuring a short vocal snippet of 'Rolling Girl' by wowaka at the beginning, followed by an MC talk segment, and then a full performance of 'Connect' by ClariS.

scenes.description: Raora Panthera briefly sings the opening lines of 'Rolling Girl'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: ロンリーガールはいつまでも 届かない夢見て騒ぐ頭の中を掻き回して、掻き回して。「問題ない。」と呟いて、言葉は失われた？もう失敗、もう失敗。間違い探しに終われば、また、回るの！もう一回、もう一回。「私は今日も転がります。」と、少女は言う 少女は言う言葉に意味を奏でながら！「もう良いかい？」「まだですよ、まだまだ先は見えないので。息を止めるの、今。」
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: For lonely girls, it's always the same, Dreaming dreams that don't come true And churning, churning Through the clamor in their heads. A lonely girl mutters 'I'm fine', Have words failed her? A failure, a failure. Obsessing over her mistakes Makes everything spin again! One more time, one more time. 'I'll roll along today' The girl said, the girl said Breathing life into the words! 'How about now?' 'Not yet, We still can't see what's ahead. Hold your breath, for now.'

scenes.description: MC talk segment where Raora Panthera speaks to the audience.
Full performance of 'Connect' by Raora Panthera and Kronii.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I won't forget the promise we made. I close my eyes and confirm it. I'll brush aside the encroaching darkness and move forward. When will I be able to see the lost future here again? I will tear through the shadows of anxiety that have overflowed, again and again, and walk through this world. Time, which has been engraved endlessly, now signals the beginning. Carrying my unchanging feelings, I will open the closed door. My awakened heart has started running to draw the future. Even if I stop on a difficult path, the sky is always waiting with a beautiful blue. So I'm not afraid. No matter what happens, I won't be discouraged. If I look back, I have friends, and when I realize it, I was gently wrapped up. In a world where everything was distorted, this, the only thing I can believe in, was my salvation. If we share both joy and sadness, our feelings will grow stronger. If this voice reaches you, surely a miracle can happen. I won't forget the promise we made. I close my eyes and confirm it. I'll brush aside the encroaching darkness and move forward. Even if there is a big wall, I will cross it. Surely, believing in tomorrow and praying. Wandering in a broken world, I arrived as if drawn. My awakened heart has started running to draw the future. Even if I stop on a difficult path, the sky is always waiting with a beautiful blue. So I'm not afraid. No matter what happens, I won't be discouraged. Always waiting for tomorrow.
